name: io.github.creator35lwb-web/verifimind-genesis
title: VerifiMind PEAS - RefleXion Trinity
description: Multi-Agent AI Validation: X-Z-CS Trinity. BYOK, UUID tiers, Validation Paradox. v0.5.19

tools.name: consult_agent_x
tools.description: Innovation & Strategy Analysis — X Agent v4.2 with competitive positioning vs LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Swarm

tools.name: consult_agent_z
tools.description: Ethics & Compliance Review — Z Guardian v4.2 Sentinel-Verified with 21-framework, 4-tier jurisdictional coverage (International / EU / US / ASEAN)

tools.name: consult_agent_cs
tools.description: Security Validation — CS Security v1.1 Sentinel-Verified: 6-stage pipeline, 12 dimensions, OWASP Agentic AI Top 10, reasoning-layer audit

tools.name: run_full_trinity
tools.description: Complete X → Z → CS Trinity validation with Chain of Thought. Each agent sees prior reasoning. Returns unified assessment with scores.

tools.name: list_prompt_templates
tools.description: List available prompt templates with optional filtering by agent, category, or tags

tools.name: get_prompt_template
tools.description: Get a specific prompt template by ID including full content and variables

tools.name: export_prompt_template
tools.description: Export a prompt template to Markdown or JSON format

tools.name: register_custom_template
tools.description: Register a new custom prompt template for X, Z, or CS agent

tools.name: import_template_from_url
tools.description: Import a prompt template from a URL (GitHub Gist, raw file, etc.)

tools.name: get_template_statistics
tools.description: Get statistics about the template registry including counts by agent, phase, and type
